name: db-agent-plugin
description: Safe, read-only database query agent for Claude Code. Built on narai-primitives (subpath ./db). Every statement passes the policy gate before any driver loads or any connection is opened.

install_guardrails.description: Block direct DB-client invocations (psql, mysql, sqlite3, mongosh, pg_dump, aws dynamodb, ...) from Bash so all database access is routed through the db-agent CLI. Strongly recommended. Set to 'off' to disable.
